purpose: Text-based evidence of P188 DB migration and P191 binary removal. Replaces binary blobs in git history. Auditors can verify migration by running sqlite3 queries against local DB and comparing sha256 values.

production_db.note: NOT tracked in git — local only. Add path to .gitignore to prevent future accidental commits.

backup_db.note: NOT tracked in git — local only. Pre-migration backup preserved as rollback reference.
backup_db.note_2: Pre-migration state — no bet_index column. Use sha256 to verify backup integrity.

p191_binary_heavy_commit.message: P188-P191: reconcile replay DB and post-migration governance
p191_binary_heavy_commit.note: This commit contained DB binaries (lottery_v2.db 96MB + backup 51MB). P196 replaces it with a non-binary recommit.

external_storage_policy.note: DB binaries are intentionally excluded from pushable git history. Store production DB and backup on local disk, secure offsite backup, or a data management system outside git.
external_storage_policy.do_not_delete_local_copies: Do NOT delete local copies of lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db or backups/p188_*.db until external backup is confirmed and validated.
